ui.title: Customer Insights Widget
ui.desc: Highlight top-performing anchor customers and suppliers by invoice submission volume and financed values.

data.sql: SELECT C_CUST_ID as "Customer_ID", COUNT(*) as "Total_Count", SUM(Y_AMT) as "Financed_Value" FROM %EXIMTRX%.IPLC_MASTER GROUP BY C_CUST_ID ORDER BY "Financed_Value" DESC
